positive: Minimalist abstract bioluminescent forest silhouette, featuring stylized glowing flora and fauna against a deep indigo night sky. The scene should incorporate interlocking geometric patterns derived from natural forms (leaves, circuits, crystalline structures). The lighting should be highly dramatic and neon-accented, utilizing vibrant cyan, electric lime, and ethereal magenta as primary accent colors against a midnight blue background. Composition must be centered and vertically balanced for maximum impact on apparel. Use clean, thick outlines and flat color fills to ensure print clarity. Stylized vector art aesthetic, high contrast, perfect symmetry.
